title: BaUtils
description: Some survival utilities and challenges - bundled into one plugin
body:
This is a Challenge + Utility plugin. Challenges are small or bigger game modifications that should make the game harder and more fun. Each challenge can be toggled and combined in a easy to use menu. Some challenges even come with settings that can be modified to make them even harder or easier.

I created this plugin together with `Hydropy#1572` because sadly it is hard to find a compact all in one challenge plugin in english language that is not locked behind multiple paywalls or fishy. I hope you like it :)
--- ## Commands and Usage All core features can be changed and toggled in a reponsive inventory menu | Command | Permission | Description | |:-:|:-:|:-:| | /settings | `butils.mods` | Modify all challenges | | /challenge | `butils.challenge` | Start and stop challenges | | /backpack | *none* | Access a global or privat backpack | | /heal | `butils.heal` | Heal yourself or other | | /hide /show | `butils.hide` | Hide yourself or other from others | | /invsee | `butils.invsee` | Look into others inventory | | /position | *none* | Save and show important positions | | /reset | `butils.reset` | Resets all loaded worlds (requires 1 restart) | Note - We will adjust the permission in the future. Please check them before updating ## Overview Challenge menu with multiple sides to modify your game. ![](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/WEy8dBvx/images/69a1cd24fd439815dac57248b687bed809aa28ea.png)

Look into the gallery to see some challenge examples. Here is the current challenge list overview
Challenge List
  • Hunger Games
  • Block World
  • Chest Randomizer
  • Ultra Ultra Hardcore
  • Ultra Hardcore
  • Jackhammer
  • Exploding World
  • New Level -> New Item
  • New Level -> Larger Border
  • Captive MC
  • Block Wall
  • The floor is Lava
  • TNT Run (floor is air)
  • Damage on move
  • Damage Multiplier
  • Block Randomizer
  • Force Hunt - Item
  • Force Hunt - Mob
  • Force Hunt - Biome
  • Force Hunt - Height
  • Limited Biome Time
  • Limited Chunk Time
  • Limited Height Time
  • Limited World Time
  • Item Decay
  • Anvil Crusher
  • Chunk Clearer
  • Chunk Decay
  • Chunk Breaker
  • Chunk Sink
  • Mirror Events
  • Disable Block Break (damage)
  • Disable Block Place (damage)
  • Disable Crafting (damage)
  • Disable Trading (damage)
  • Disable Exp Collect (damage)
  • Disable Item Pickup (damage)
  • Traffic Lights
  • Tron (snake)
  • Vampire Mode

In addition we provide some hunt challenges, where you can collect some stuff in order to progress
Hunt Anything
  • Collect all survival items in random order
  • Kill all natural mobs in random order

And in addition BUtils provide some new custom gamerules to change the game fealing
Custom Gamerules
  • Show player hearts (hp) in the tablist
  • Kick or ban a player on damage
  • Enable soup healing - Inspired by the hunger games pvp game mode
  • Toggle PvP
## API & Timer Some players may want a timer to their challenges. We decide to not create a new one because there are so many timer plugins already. We don't have to invent the wheel again. Sadly, only one timer plugin seems to have an API on Modrinth so we could only implement support for [MTimer & Clock](https://modrinth.com/plugin/timer). The timer starts and stops automaticly with your challenges.

If you want support for other timers please contact `Hydropy#1572` on Discord. The only have to be on Modrinth and must have a public API ## Disclaimer Somewhere in the internet is another "BUtils" plugin that inplement a few challenges like ours but paid. Our plugin is completly self coded and free.
Sadly, we receive a lot hate speech and threats from the owner of the other plugin and got informed about false claims about our plugin contains malware to motivate users to pay. We want to be as transparent as possible to you so we working on making BaUtils open source. Meanwhile, BaUtils is unobfuscated and you can decompile it to verify :)

Please don't join the discord named BUtils and talk about our plugin to prevent them getting annoyed and you getting threatend. ## Feedback & Last Words Wow, you are still reading!
Sadly, Modrinth has no comment feature and we don't want to create the next annoying Discord server you have to join. So, if you want to say something or request features please contact `Hydropy#1572` on Discord
It is planned to make this project open source in the future. I just want to clean up the code first.
